programme.title: Credit hire foundation to advanced training programme

certification_tiers.label: Foundation certificate
certification_tiers.description: Core entitlement, legal framework and industry landscape

certification_tiers.label: Practitioner certificate
certification_tiers.description: Full operational competence including liability, qualifying periods, intervention, rates, evidence and claims handling

certification_tiers.label: Advanced certificate
certification_tiers.description: Full programme including litigation, industry dynamics and emerging issues

each_module_contains: module.learning_objectives[] — array of LO objects with id and text
module.sections[] — array of section objects (see below)
each_section_contains: section.concept — core concept text (shown as the concept card)
section.scenario.teaching_points[] — AI tutor guidance for this scenario
section.knowledge_check — in-section MCQ with options and correct flag
each_assessment_question_contains: question.options[] — array with text, correct flag, and optional explanation

build_instructions.overview: These JSON files contain all content needed to build the learning section of credit-hire.ai. The learning section is at /learn alongside the existing /app route.
ui_components_needed: Module dashboard — shows all 10 modules with progress, level badges, and lock state
Module intro page — title, objectives, duration, sections list
Section reader — concept card, content points, scenario box, knowledge check
AI tutor chat — conversational interface powered by Claude API with section-specific system prompt
Assessment engine — renders MCQ, true/false, and scenario questions; tracks score; shows results
Certification page — displays earned certificates with completion date
Progress tracker — persists completion state per user per module

ai_tutor_implementation.scenario_injection: The scenario text from module.sections[n].scenario.text should be injected into the system prompt or provided as initial context
ai_tutor_implementation.conversation_history: Maintain full conversation history within a session; reset on section change
ai_tutor_implementation.session_end_trigger: After 8 exchanges, the tutor should summarise learning and offer to move to the next section

forum_integration.chatbot_queries: The 'Further reading' queries in each module should be presented as clickable prompts that open the main credit-hire.ai news query interface pre-populated with the query text

progress_persistence.method: Use the existing storage API in credit-hire.ai

refresh_cadence.modules_09_and_10: Quarterly content review using credit-hire.ai news feed; update content_points and scenario text to reflect current market conditions
refresh_cadence.all_modules: Annual review of case references and legal principles

file_locations.place_in: Dropbox/companies/Credit Hire Forum/Credit Hire Forum Website/Historic/credit-hire-ai/learn/
